M51 RuggedMobile Computer.name: M51 RuggedMobile Computer
M51 RuggedMobile Computer.Description:
The M51 rugged mobile computer delivers a 6‑inch full HD touch display, Android 14 OS, powerful Qualcomm 6490 octa- core processor, integrated NFC and optional 2D barcode scanner.  From enhancing retail store operations and warehouse management to ticketing – boost efficiency with the M51 mobile computer.
*OS 360 sold separately. **Exact battery life depends on use.
*OS 360 sold separately. **Exact battery life depends on use.
The M51 Android mobile computer offers a brilliant, 6-inch FHD multi-touch display complete with chemically strengthened glass.
With the integrated NFC, customers can quickly and easily tap contactless payments through the glass.
With the optional 2D barcode scanner, you can easily manage inventory, expedite queues, fulfill curbside pickups, or scan ticket at venues.
The M51 offers an integrated 13MP auto-focus rear camera and a 8MP fixed-focus front camera.
EloView allows you to deploy and securely manage your entire network of Android-powered Elo devices from anywhere in the world.
Manage battery life with ease by viewing up-to- date battery statistics directly on the device or manage your entire fleet directly from EloView.
Provision your devices in seconds with a seamless out-of-the-box experience.
Leverage Elo Home to create a customized interface on your mobile Android device.
With easy-to-use development kits, robust management tools, world class life cycle management and security, Elo can help you deliver the convenience and familiarity of Android interfaces in a secure, business-friendly way.
EloCare OS 360 – Access bi-monthly security updates and OS upgrades through Android 15 to keep your devices secure. Learn More
Google Android Enterprise Recommended – Rest assured that the M51 has met Google’s strict enterprise requirements.
Seamless Provisioning – Leverage EloView or Google Zero Touch to integrate with your choice of MDM provider.
Elo OEMConfig – Get immediate support of Elo’s proprietary APIs on your favorite MDM platforms and manage device- specific features and settings.
From advance unit replacement to OS 360, EloCare delivers service and support from the people who know your Elo products best.
We engineer each product with a goal that goes beyond meeting expectations; we aim to exceed them. By integrating our technology into your operations, you are partnering with us - and as your partner, we are committed to delivering reliable products so you can focus on growth and innovation, confident in the knowledge that we stand behind our products, ready to support you every step of the way.
